---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What user problem does this feature solve? If it's a workaround you're doing today, describe it.

## Proposed solution

What would you like claude-apply to do? Be as concrete as possible — a small code snippet or a CLI invocation is ideal.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why you'd prefer this one.

## Additional context

Screenshots, links to ATS documentation, anything else that helps.
